metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4766
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 2: AGAP1 is enriched in synaptosomal biochemical fractions, but co-localizes with synaptic marker proteins at only 15% of puncta in confocal fluorescence microscopy of cultured hippocampal neurons.

Figure 3: Strong co-localization with AP3 showed AGAP1 localized to endosomal compartments in dendrites in E18 hippocampal neurons.. Experimental description: "Bloc1s8sdy/sdy (sandy) mice have the C57/B6 genetic background, and were previously described (Larimore et al., 2014)."

"Synaptosomes were prepared from postnatal-day (P) 23 WT mice"

"Hippocampal neurons were cultured form embryonic day (E) 18 Sprague-Dawley rat embryos dissected from pregnant rats"

"The polyclonal rabbit antibody against the C-terminus of AGAP1 was previously characterized, and shown to be specific for AGAP1 (Nie et al., 2002, 2003, 2005). It recognizes both human and rodent AGAP1, is specific for AGAP1, and does not cross react with AGAP2 or other proteins (Nie et al., 2002, 2003; Xia et al., 2003). "
